title: The Angels version of 3I and Adam
display_title: The Angels version of 3I and Adam
wikitext:
[]: The Angels' version of 3I and Adam.             Quote Post by Replicator » Sat Dec 01, 2012 8:47 pm In the original NGE, it's generally stated that the Angels are attempting to contact Adam to initiate the Third Impact. But isn't there a problem with this theory. 1. The Evangelions are supposed to be more or less clones grown from Adam, so assuming the EVAs are genetically identical to Adam, couldn't an Angel substitute one for the original Adam? We see in Episodes 16, 18, and 23 that this clearly isn't the case. If an Angel was supposed to make contact with Adam, the Third Impact was supposed to occur, except in none of these situations does anything Impact-like happen. Bardiel occupies and controls EVA Unit-03, and uses the EVA as its own body. When Armisael fuses with EVA Unit-00, only the "Angel Tower" is grown, but Rei self-destructs Unit-00 so we might not know the full extent of what could have followed. As well, in Episode 13, Gendo orders the EVAs to be force-ejected, in fear of Ireul making contact with them (and especially EVA Unit-01). And lastly, there's EVA Unit-01. Presuming Unit-01 is derived in some form from Lilith (as it bears the Fruit of Wisdom), then why didn't an Impact start when Leliel consumed it? Of course, the NERV crew rushed to attempt to salvage the EVA, so it still might be possible 3I would have been possible at some point. 2. Do the Angels know Adam's soul has been separated the body? The Adam embryo in this case would be somewhat in a similar position as the Evangelions, as I discussed earlier. Could Kaworu/Tabris who was in SEELE's custody for most of the series have been used in place for Adam? Discuss.

[]: Re: The Angels' version of 3I and Adam.             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Mon Dec 03, 2012 12:22 pm Replicator wrote: The Evangelions are supposed to be more or less clones grown from Adam, so assuming the EVAs are genetically identical to Adam, couldn't an Angel substitute one for the original Adam? We see in Episodes 16, 18, and 23 that this clearly isn't the case. If an Angel was supposed to make contact with Adam, the Third Impact was supposed to occur, except in none of these situations does anything Impact-like happen.

[]:             Quote Post by gorgeousshutin » Tue Dec 04, 2012 7:11 pm Why it took 14 years for the first angel to show since Second Impact is still a mystery. The latest movie in the Rebuild series, Q might offer some insights but since it is not known if the two Eva series are related or not, I will decline to describe further.

Article: The Angels version of 3I and Adam
[]: The Angels' version of 3I and Adam.             Quote Post by Replicator » Sat Dec 01, 2012 8:47 pm In the original NGE, it's generally stated that the Angels are attempting to contact Adam to initiate the Third Impact. But isn't there a problem with this theory. 1. The Evangelions are supposed to be more or less clones grown from Adam, so assuming the EVAs are genetically identical to Adam, couldn't an Angel substitute one for the original Adam? We see in Episodes 16, 18, and 23 that this clearly isn't the case. If an Angel was supposed to make contact with Adam, the Third Impact was supposed to occur, except in none of these situations does anything Impact-like happen. Bardiel occupies and controls EVA Unit-03, and uses the EVA as its own body. When Armisael fuses with EVA Unit-00, only the "Angel Tower" is grown, but Rei self-destructs Unit-00 so we might not know the full extent of what could have followed. As well, in Episode 13, Gendo orders the EVAs to be force-ejected, in fear of Ireul making contact with them (and especially EVA Unit-01). And lastly, there's EVA Unit-01. Presuming Unit-01 is derived in some form from Lilith (as it bears the Fruit of Wisdom), then why didn't an Impact start when Leliel consumed it? Of course, the NERV crew rushed to attempt to salvage the EVA, so it still might be possible 3I would have been possible at some point. 2. Do the Angels know Adam's soul has been separated the body? The Adam embryo in this case would be somewhat in a similar position as the Evangelions, as I discussed earlier. Could Kaworu/Tabris who was in SEELE's custody for most of the series have been used in place for Adam? Discuss.
